tools.example: pre-commit / CI gate that catches missing YAML frontmatter and banned _v\d+/_old/_new suffixes on new docs/**/*.md

tools.desc: validate .ext entries (raw#13 — kind whitelist + required fields)
tools.example: verify every external resource declared in /.ext has the required kind + why keys before commit
verify ~/.hive/resource-lb-state is well-formed before the load_balancer reads it — running-count ≥ 0, last-pick-ts integer, slug present

tools.desc: pick one host from a ranked candidate list using a chosen LB strategy (weighted-rr|least-loaded|sticky)
tools.example: load_balancer.hexa weighted-rr ubu1,ubu2,hetzner 1.0,0.8,0.6 → emits chosen slug + updates ~/.hive/resource-lb-state
tools.exit_codes: 0=ok+slug on stdout, 1=empty candidate list, 2=parse error, 3=state write fail

tools.desc: validate .resource entries (kind whitelist + required fields + scoring-weight range + capabilities non-empty)
tools.example: verify ~/core/hive/.resource is well-formed before the workload router consumes it — required fields per kind, scoring-weight in [0..1], capabilities non-empty

tools.desc: rank hosts in .resource for a workload by capability + free capacity + scoring-weight
tools.example: resource_scorer.hexa gpu,cuda13 8 → ranked list: host-ubu1 1.000, host-ubu2 0.840, ... — discards hosts that fail capability bracket pruning
pre-commit guard — confirm .raw + .own present and parse-cleanly + os-lock scope dotfiles exist
tools.exit_codes: 0=PASS, 1=FAIL (one or more sub-checks failed; WARN does not count)

tools.desc: validate .swarm cell-cohort files (header + cell directives + required fields)
tools.example: verify ~/.hive/swarm/*.swarm parse cleanly with required 'command' fields and no duplicate cell ids
verify the telegram bot config is well-formed before /telegram-connect — required keys per status, exactly one live entry, integer fields

tools.desc: emit docker exec command line for the top-ranked host given a workload spec
tools.example: workload_router.hexa gpu,cuda13 8 -- hexa nexus drill --seed foo → emits: docker -H ssh://ubu exec -i airgenome-claude hexa nexus drill --seed foo
tools.exit_codes: 0=ok+command on stdout, 1=no host matches, 2=parse error, 3=top host unreachable / lookup failed

tools.desc: L0 chflags uchg / chattr +i lock manager (canonical lock/unlock path per BASELINE)
tools.exit_codes: 0=PASS / lock state as expected, 1=verify failed (any SSOT < L1)
